stmt: ∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [PartialOrder α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ h : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α, h.1 = □h.1
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [PartialOrder α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ∀ g h : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g = h
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ x : α, ⊠(⊥ : α) ≤ x → (ACR.Consistent α ↔ ¬ (x ≤ (⊥ : α)))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], (∀ {x y : α}, x ≤ y → □y ≤ x → x ≡ □y) → (∀ h₁ h₂ : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α, h₁.1 ≡ h₂.1)
